hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f && [ -n "$f" ] && case "$f" in /home/billduke/Documents/memenow/memenow-site/*) case "$f" in *.svelte|*.ts|*.js|*.css|*.jsonc|*.md) (cd /home/billduke/Documents/memenow/memenow-site && pnpm exec prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f") ;; esac ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
